description: This video explains different types of liquid staking derivatives (LSDs) available for Ethereum, including rebasing tokens, reward-bearing tokens, and base plus reward tokens.
topic_summary: Explore the various types of liquid staking derivatives (LSDs) for Ethereum, including rebasing tokens with Lido [t=1:92], reward-bearing tokens with Coinbase and Rocketpool [t=16:96], and base plus reward tokens with Stakewise [t=28:49].
